chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D – 5398 of 2021 Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.22615/2021 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objections No.1 and 18 3. For order on Misc. No.22616/2021 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.22617/2021 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 07.09.2021 Mr. Zamir Hussain Ghumro, advocate for the petitioners ----------------------------------- 1. Urgency granted. 2-5. At the outset, learned counsel for the petitioners contends that since this Court has dismissed Constitutional Petition No. D – 5281 of 2021 by order dated 07.9.2021, this petition involves same question; hence same may be disposed of in terms of referred order. In view of above statement, instant petition is disposed of along with listed applications in terms of order dated 07.9.2021 passed in Constitutional Petition No. D – 5281 of 2021 JUDGE JUDGE Zahid/*
